rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match in the reference list (no in-text citation context or quoted surrounding text). While both papers use scanner-data marketing settings and include promotion-related variables, the cited paper focuses on pre/postpromotion dip elasticities, whereas the citing paper’s core contribution is an endogeneity-estimation method for mixed-logit choice. With this sparse evidence, it is not safe to confidently treat the citation as purely incidental or clearly substantive.
